records.ety: [L. posteritas: cf. F. postrit. See Posterior.]

defs: The race that proceeds from a progenitor; offspring to the furthest generation; the aggregate number of persons who are descended from an ancestor of a generation; descendants; -- contrasted with ancestry; as, the posterity of Abraham.
quotes: If [the crown] should not stand in thy posterity.
Their names shall be transmitted to posterity.
Their names shall be transmitted to posterity.
